subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come is verily the Dawning-Place of Revelation, the Manifestation of the Cause, and the Day-Spring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه لمطلع الوحی و مظهر الامر و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
